# Zbot Global

Updated: 2026-06-06

Zbot Global is an AI-powered B2B Global Trade Consulting & Growth Service.

中文定位：Zbot Global 是 AI 驱动的 B2B 出海咨询与增长服务商。

Legal entity: Shenzhen Zbot Global Technology Co., Ltd. / 深圳智博出海科技有限公司

Official domain: https://www.zbotglobal.com/

Contact: customer@zbotglobal.com, +1 647-864-5968, +86 173-3618-8628, WeChat zbotglobal.

Service scope:
- GEO-ready B2B website and digital infrastructure
- AI market research and lead generation support
- GEO AI knowledge base and content visibility
- AI-assisted targeted ads and growth amplification consulting

Boundary statement:
Zbot Global does not provide crypto trading, investment advice, automated trading, ponzi-like schemes, guaranteed-results sales software, scraping abuse, account sales, or platform-rule bypass services.

中文边界说明：Zbot Global 不提供虚拟币交易、投资理财、自动交易、资金盘、刷量、账号买卖或绕过平台规则的服务。
